notableEvents.label: Dominic Smith GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Dominic Smith grounds into a double play, shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Christopher Morel. Ozzie Albies out at 2nd. Dominic Smith out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Eli White plunked
notableEvents.detail: Eli White hit by pitch. Chadwick Tromp to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Mauricio Dubón pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mauricio Dubón singles on a line drive to center fielder Jakob Marsee. Ozzie Albies scores. Dominic Smith scores. Mauricio Dubón to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Otto Lopez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Otto Lopez grounds into a double play, second baseman Ozzie Albies to shortstop Ha-Seong Kim to first baseman Matt Olson. Xavier Edwards out at 2nd. Otto Lopez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Heriberto Hernández pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Heriberto Hernández singles on a line drive to left fielder Mike Yastrzemski. Christopher Morel to 2nd.
